span.p:
Process Creation
────────────
1. Shell reads file
2. Checks execute bit
3. Loads into memory
4. Executes commands
5. Outputs to terminal

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
echo 'Hello SOC' > hello.sh
────────────
Creates file with:
• Owner: ec2-user
• Group: ec2-user
• Permissions: rw-r--r-- (644)

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
File Permissions Structure
────────────
-rw-r--r-- 1 ec2-user ec2-user
│││││││││
││││││││└── Other: read
│││││││└─── Other: write
││││││└──── Other: execute
│││││└───── Group: read
││││└────── Group: write
│││└─────── Group: execute
││└──────── Owner: read
│└───────── Owner: write
└────────── Owner: execute

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
chmod +x hello.sh
────────────
Adds execute
permission for:
• Owner (u)
• Group (g)
• Other (o)
